info.name: BidForge — Auction Engine API
info.description:
Complete request collection for the BidForge auction backend.

HOW TO USE
1. Start Oracle (docker compose up -d) and the app (./mvnw spring-boot:run).
2. Run folder '1 Auth' first (it stores the JWTs into collection variables).
3. Any folder can then be run individually, or run the whole collection top-to-bottom with the Collection Runner — every request carries its own tests, so the Runner shows a green checklist.

Seeded accounts: admin/Admin@123, seller1|bidder1|bidder2/Password@123.

exec: // Fresh future timestamps so auction-creation requests always pass @Future validation.

request.description: Public registration — always creates a normal USER (admins exist only via seed data).
